author: Aki Gogikar (OneNewAI)
name: SKC Ternary Reasoner (8L d256)
blurb: SKC Ternary Reasoner: 8L dim=256 vocab=1024 seq=256. Spectral Koopman Capsule architecture with causal blockwise WHT (block=16), FrequencyBandRouter, KoopmanSpectralEvolution, symmetric UNet capsule skip connections. Muon optimizer, LAWA+SWA, engram hash (orders=3), n-gram cache (order=5), temperature scaling, sliding eval. ~3.8M ternary params in ~2.0MB.
